workflow: Rubble Multi-Bin Pack (NEW Frahan>Quarry component) demonstrator
data: 20 small boundary blocks (0.003-0.02 m3) from example 15 + 6 largest of 30 ETH stones, internalized in .gh
note: Each stone is a bin holding multiple blocks; voxel-occupancy FFD with true per-vertex enclosure. Blocks coloured by bin inside gray stone cages.
